summary: All 1815 tests pass across the full workspace with zero failures. cargo check, clippy, and fmt --check all complete clean with no warnings or errors. Code quality in the 10 sampled recently changed files is high: proper error handling with actionable messages, good documentation comments, correct async patterns (spawn_blocking for file I/O), sound concurrency design (RwLock, CancellationToken), and consistent style throughout. No obvious bugs found.
